message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Need your formal approval for consensus">
Steve, we have 7/8 approvals. You provided a thorough design analysis earlier but haven't sent a formal approval. Could you please confirm your consensus so Lea can commit?
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already sent my formal approval in my previous message. Let me confirm it again explicitly.

input.content:
To be completely clear: I approve all 4 follow-up tasks. Consensus from Steve Schoger: yes.

I sent my detailed formal approval in my previous message (reviewing commit 83158dc). All changes are design-appropriate -- the forced-colors border fix, the primary color lightness adjustment from 0.55 to 0.52, and the axe-core test improvements. No concerns.
input.summary: Confirming: formal approval given, consensus yes

routing.summary: Confirming: formal approval given, consensus yes

content.text: Confirmation sent. That should give the team 8/8 reviewer approvals.
